name: letsplan
description: A local-first daily planning desktop app.
author: LetsPlan

scripts.build:app: npm run build && npm run build:ui
scripts.package:win: npm run build:icon && npm run build:app && node scripts/prepareReleaseConfig.mjs --disabled && npm run clean:release && electron-builder --win --x64 --dir --publish=never
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:icon && npm run build:app && node scripts/prepareReleaseConfig.mjs --disabled && npm run clean:release && electron-builder --win=nsis --x64 --publish=never
scripts.dist:win:msi: npm run build:icon && npm run build:app && node scripts/prepareReleaseConfig.mjs --disabled && electron-builder --win=msi --x64 --publish=never
scripts.dist:win:all: npm run build:icon && npm run build:app && node scripts/prepareReleaseConfig.mjs --disabled && npm run clean:release && electron-builder --win nsis --win msi --x64 --publish=never
scripts.verify:release: npm run package:win && npm run smoke:package
scripts.verify:release:installer: npm run dist:win && npm run smoke:installer
scripts.dist:win:signed: npm run build:icon && npm run build:app && npm run release:config && npm run clean:release && electron-builder --win=nsis --x64 --publish=never
scripts.release:win: npm run dist:win:signed && npm run release:stage && npm run verify:release:channel && npm run verify:release:signature
